storyboard.content: Pain in my right wrist after falling hard on it while hiking 3 days ago
There is significant swelling around my wrist
There is visible bruising around the wrist area
I can barely move my wrist at all
The area around the wrist feels very tender when I touch it
Injury happened 3 days ago and the pain has gotten worse rather than better since then
Pain is 7 out of 10 and I am unable to use my right hand normally for everyday tasks
32-year-old female, injury caused by a fall while hiking
